mapper.sql: id, course_id, course_name, type_id, type_name, teacher_id, teacher_name, title, option_a, option_b, option_c, option_d, option_e, option_f, answer, analysis, score, difficulty, status, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: select from question order by create_time desc
select from question where course_id = #{courseId} and status = 1 order by create_time desc
select from question where type_id = #{typeId} and status = 1 order by create_time desc
select from question where teacher_id = #{teacherId} and status = 1 order by create_time desc
select from question where course_id = #{courseId} and type_id = #{typeId} and status = 1 order by rand() limit #{count}
mapper.insert: insert into question(course_id, course_name, type_id, type_name, teacher_id, teacher_name, title, option_a, option_b, option_c, option_d, option_e, option_f, answer, analysis, score, difficulty, status) values(#{courseId}, #{courseName}, #{typeId}, #{typeName}, #{teacherId}, #{teacherName}, #{title}, #{optionA}, #{optionB}, #{optionC}, #{optionD}, #{optionE}, #{optionF}, #{answer}, #{analysis}, #{score}, #{difficulty}, #{status})
mapper.delete:
delete from question where id in
#{id}
